no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: `ddx doc audit` is failing repository-wide with pre-existing duplicate document IDs and a missing dependency outside this bead's scope, so the acceptance criterion "ddx doc audit clean" cannot be satisfied by a TD-032-only change. `ddx doc show TD-032` confirms the existing rollup TD is present at `docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-032-agentmetrics-rollup.md`, but the graph still reports unrelated integrity issues (86 total), including many duplicate IDs and one missing dep (`helix.workflow.principles` -> `helix.workflow`).
what_was_checked: existing TD-032 content, `ddx doc show TD-032`, and `ddx doc audit`
follow_up: clean up the repo-wide document graph integrity issues, then re-run `ddx doc audit` to verify the TD can be considered fully green.
